title: Raxaul Heat Wave
lead: Raxaul is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.94. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Raxaul has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 16.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 59% and the wind speed is 4.0 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The Heat Wave has led to a critical situation with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Raxaul.
